content.inputFormat:
The first line contains t, the number of test cases (about 10000). Then t test cases follow. Each test case is given in one line containing 4 integers A, B, C and P (2 ≤ P < 106, 0 < A < P, 0 ≤ B,C < P).

P is always a prime number.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, write the result in one line. The first number K is the number of solutions. Then K numbers X1, X2, ...,XK follow (0 ≤ Xi < P) in increasing order, which are the solutions to the corresponding problems.
